metadata.name: Perform a Landing Gear Swing Test

description: After a landing gear overhaul, technicians must perform a gear swing test to ensure it retracts and deploys correctly.

nodes.task_description: Put the aircraft on jacks to lift the wheels off the ground.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the aircraft is safely jacked.

nodes.task_description: Operate the landing gear controls from the cockpit to cycle the gear through retraction and deployment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cycles the landing gear multiple times.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the gear doors open and close in the correct sequence and that the gear locks securely in the up and down positions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent visually confirms the correct operation and checks for 'down and locked' indicators.
